author: fix-otel-propagation
content: Result: Implemented cross-process OTel context propagation across all 3 processes. (1) TaskManager injects span context into command queue tuples, BrowserManager extracts and creates child spans around command.execute(). (2) DataSocket injects context into data dicts, StorageController extracts before per-record span. (3) Moved request_handler from connection-level to per-record process_record spans. (4) Test now asserts all 3 services present + verifies shared trace IDs for cross-process linking. Pre-commit passes.
